title: Order confirmation failures during catalog handoff
incident_summary: Order completion rate dropped as cart confirmation waits on an outdated catalog lock path.

alerts.title: Checkout timeout spike
alerts.content: Checkout timeout rate rose to 17% with P95 above 4.8s.

alerts.title: Payment latency advisory
alerts.content: Payments dependency latency mildly elevated but within budget.

logs.title: Deprecated inventory endpoint
logs.content: checkout calling /inventory/v1/lock which now hard times out.

logs.title: Coupon cache misses
logs.content: cache misses increased during promo wave; no hard errors.

runbook_snippets.title: Dependency endpoint failover
runbook_snippets.content: Switch checkout config to /inventory/v2/lock and recycle deployment.

runbook_snippets.title: Cart UI rollback
runbook_snippets.content: UI rollback does not address backend dependency timeouts.

timeline_notes.title: Inventory v1 sunset
timeline_notes.content: Inventory team sunset /v1 lock endpoint two hours before incident.

timeline_notes.title: On-call handoff note
timeline_notes.content: Checkout team reported coupon cache noise earlier but no sustained transport failures.

red_herrings: Coupon feature experiment launched at noon but only affects recommendation panels.
true_root_cause: Checkout service still used deprecated inventory endpoint
true_root_cause_aliases: outdated dependency endpoint in checkout config
true_mitigation: Switch checkout to inventory v2 endpoint and restart pods
true_mitigation_aliases: toggle dependency endpoint to v2 then recycle checkout
update checkout config to inventory v2 and redeploy
